creator: roelof@nisser.com
text:
On the postfix mailinglist a reference was made to a certain FILTER_README
which was new to me. Strange since I had just worked with some filters and
looked at the docs. So I gave

frl:/usr/local/etc/postfix$ locate FILTER_README                                /usr/ports/mail/postfix-current/work/snapshot-20010502/FILTER_README

and found it. As well as several more, to wit

frl:/usr/local/etc/postfix$ ls /usr/ports/mail/postfix-current/work/snapshot-20010502/*README
/usr/ports/mail/postfix-current/work/snapshot-20010502/0README
/usr/ports/mail/postfix-current/work/snapshot-20010502/DB_README
/usr/ports/mail/postfix-current/work/snapshot-20010502/DEBUG_README
/usr/ports/mail/postfix-current/work/snapshot-20010502/ETRN_README
/usr/ports/mail/postfix-current/work/snapshot-20010502/FILTER_README
/usr/ports/mail/postfix-current/work/snapshot-20010502/LDAP_README
/usr/ports/mail/postfix-current/work/snapshot-20010502/LINUX_README
/usr/ports/mail/postfix-current/work/snapshot-20010502/LMTP_README
/usr/ports/mail/postfix-current/work/snapshot-20010502/MACOSX_README
/usr/ports/mail/postfix-current/work/snapshot-20010502/MYSQL_README
/usr/ports/mail/postfix-current/work/snapshot-20010502/PCRE_README
/usr/ports/mail/postfix-current/work/snapshot-20010502/SASL_README
/usr/ports/mail/postfix-current/work/snapshot-20010502/ULTRIX_README
/usr/ports/mail/postfix-current/work/snapshot-20010502/UUCP_README
/usr/ports/mail/postfix-current/work/snapshot-20010502/VIRTUAL_README
frl:/usr/local/etc/postfix$

Though I'm glad I found them, the only reason I did was that I don't
clean up after a ports install. When one does one misses interesting
information.

Fix: 

To include them in the stuff that gets stuffed into the
/usr/local/share/doc/postfix/ directory. Which contains currently only
the HTMLized manpages. Alternatively it could be put into the
/usr/local/etc/postfix directory where the sample configurations are
to be found.
How-To-Repeat: 	
install the port
